capex_mentions.quote: invested more than $200 billion in research and development in the last five years
capex_mentions.context: Cumulative 5-year R&D investment figure cited in business overview; not exclusively AI capex but cited in AI context

capex_mentions.quote: entering into significant leasing arrangements with third party operators
capex_mentions.context: AI training and inference compute capacity demand driving third-party data center leasing; no dollar amount specified

limitations: The $200B figure covers all R&D over five years, not AI-specific capex; no single-year or AI-dedicated dollar amount is isolated, which limits ai_investment_intensity to score 4 rather than 5 despite scale of commitment.
No explicit multi-year AI capex dollar commitment is stated; score 4 reflects quantified scale implied by $200B R&D and named infrastructure programs rather than a discrete AI budget line.

ai_narrative_concreteness scored 5 based on deployment evidence (Waymo paid rides, 15 products with Gemini, AI Overviews/AI Mode) but quantified business-result metrics (revenue lift, time saved, query volume) are largely absent; confidence is moderate.

Risk disclosure excerpts are present and substantive; score 4 reflects company-specific risk mechanisms (supply chain for TPUs/GPUs, cyber attack amplification via AI, regulatory liability pathways) but no formal quantified risk treatment or named oversight body is disclosed in these excerpts.
